plugins.name: tecman-docx
plugins.description: Generate or restyle Microsoft Word (.docx) documents in the Tecman house style and brand.

plugins.name: ai-project-kickoff
plugins.description: Standard process for in-house AI projects: requirements gathering captured as working markdown, with the Tecman-branded document package rendered from it at each review gate (PoC and production). Gate-aware taxonomy (LLD at PoC). Includes /new-ai-project, /render-gate-package, the ai-poc-docs skill, and a design-reviewer agent. Requires tecman-docx.
